title: Consultant
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking consultant with 3 - 7 years experience in Temenos TAP development with Strong expertise in AAA Core, IRIS API, TTI/TFI interfaces, Opentext Report (formerly know as Actuate ErdPrdo reports) to support development, customization, integration and maintenance of different components of TAP (AAA).

Responsibilities

  • Collaborate with functional teams, business stakeholders and integration partners to deliver high-quality banking applications.
  • Write Technical specifications and design architecture for other team members to do developments
  • Design, develop and maintain Triple A Core object like Format, screens, profiles, application parameters, meta dictionary.
  • Design, develop and maintain OpenText Reports using new features like Modularity.
  • Design, develop and maintain IRIS interfaces for inbound and outbound integrations.
  • Design, develop and maintain external services in AAA.
  • Design, develop and maintain F2B and B2F integrations using TTI/TFI
  • Create and maintain file layouts, mappings, and transformation logics
  • Installation of AAA on DMZR
  • Handle batch processing, scheduling and reconciliation activities.
  • Design, develop and maintain AAA-TDH flow
  • Support integrations with external systems using REST, MQ, KAFKA, file-based mechanisms
  • Migration to new version R24
  • Prepare technical deliveries and support implementation by integration teams.
  • Perform functional testing of PMS domain systems (formalization in ALM System)
  • Validate solutions done by vendors / other team members and propose improvements.
  • Contribute to key and strategic projects
  • Contribute to Support Activities
  • Implement Continuous integration and continuous delivery for AAA components.
  • Contribute to Asset documentation.
  • Perform quality reporting and controls in line with the Teams QACMP
  • Applications managed by the team: Triple A core objects, TTI/TFI, IRIS API, OpenText Report, , functional asset unicity


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in information technology / computer science or any related field
  • Minimum 3 - 7 years experience in Triple A / AAA development. Overall experience not more than 15 years
  • Require 3 - 7 years’ experience in IT Development activities
  • Previous exposure on Odyssey's Triple'A system is a must
  • Previous experience on TTI /TFI / IRIS API is mandatory
  • Experience in Unix (shell scripting), Oracle, Postgres & Open text is a required
  • Experience on OpenText report is good to have
  • Knowledge of process methodology is required
  • Experience of business support in a Wealth Management organization is a plus
  • CFA, PMP, Business Analyst certifications are a plus


Interested candidates may apply through the application system or send it to lv@morganmckinley.com Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy . You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd
Dinu Dinesh

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
